name: Caldo De Gallina (Chicken Broth)
text:
Recipe ID: caldo_de_gallina_merged
Name: Caldo De Gallina (Chicken Broth)

Ingredients:
- INGREDIENTS: (For 5 l.)
- 1.5 kg Chicken.
- 2 kg Onion.
- 1 kg Peeled Garlic.
- 2 kg Dried Chickpeas.
- 1.5 l Water

Steps:
1. PREVIOUS NOTE
2. The fat from the chicken will add a lot of flavor to the broth. It should be added to the pot when preparing the broth.
3. PREPARATION:
4. Mise en Place
5. - Soak the chickpeas the night before.
6. - Chop the chicken, separating the breasts, thighs with legs, wings, and carcasses.
7. - Separate the chicken pieces on trays with parchment paper.
8. - Roast in the oven at 220ºC until the chicken is very golden. Approximately 60 min.
9. - Confit the garlic with enough olive oil to have a uniform golden color.
10. - Cut the onion into regular cubes (mirepoix) and sauté in enough oil until a uniform and very intense caramelization is achieved.
11. Development
12. - Place the sautéed onions and garlic, well drained of the oil in which they were confited, in a pressure cooker. Add the chicken and chickpeas and cover with water.
13. - Close the pressure cooker well and bring to the heat.
14. - Maintain a high heat until the pressure is released and then lower the heat to the minimum.
15. - Maintain this for 2 hours.
16. - Cool the pressure cooker before opening it.
17. - Strain the broth using a chinois. Press the meat well to obtain as much broth as possible.
18. Reduction
19. - Place the broth in a container and cover with film. Cool in the blast chiller until the fat solidifies on the surface.
20. - Remove the fat completely and place the broth in a tall pot to reduce it.
21. - Reduce the broth until you obtain 5.5 l.
22. - Pass through a micro strainer, adjust the salt and reserve in vacuum bags, either in refrigeration (weekly use) or in freezing.

Other details:

translated_from: es

PREPARATION:

- Chop the chicken, separating the breasts, thighs with legs, wings, and carcasses.
- Separate the chicken pieces on trays with parchment paper.
- Roast in the oven at 220ºC until the chicken is very golden. Approximately 60 min.
- Confit the garlic with enough olive oil to have a uniform golden color.
- Cut the onion into regular cubes (mirepoix) and sauté in enough oil until a uniform and very intense caramelization is achieved.
Development
- Place the sautéed onions and garlic, well drained of the oil in which they were confited, in a pressure cooker. Add the chicken and chickpeas and cover with water.
- Close the pressure cooker well and bring to the heat.
- Maintain a high heat until the pressure is released and then lower the heat to the minimum.
- Maintain this for 2 hours.

Reduction

name: Dal Recipe
text:
Recipe ID: dal_recipe_parsed
Name: Dal Recipe

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of toor dal
- 1 cup of moong dal
- ½ cup of chana dal
- 1 cup of moga dal
- 1 cup of urad dal
- 1 tsp of turmeric
- 1 tsp salt
- 1 tbsp of ghee
- 3 ladle of oil
- 1 kashmiri
- 1 tbsp of mustard seeds
- 1 tbsp of cumin seeds
- 15 fresh curry leaves
- 1 tbsp of green chilli chopped
- 1 chopped finely onion
- 1 tsp of turmeric
- 2 medium tomato finely chopped
- 1 tbsp of ground coriander
- 2 cup of water
- salt to taste
- fresh coriander

Steps:
1. Soak 10 minute in water 1 cup of toor dal,1 cup of moong dal,½ cup of chana dal, 1 cup of moga dal, 1 cup of urad dal
2. After cooking them until ready in boiling water with 1 tsp of turmeric and 1 tsp salt
3. Heat a pan with 1 tbsp of ghee and 3 ladle of oil, toast 1 kashmiri ,1 tbsp of mustard seeds,1 tbsp of cumin seeds, 15 fresh curry leaves, 1 tbsp of green chilli chopped and 1 chopped finely onion, toast everything properly
4. Add 1 tsp of turmeric and 2 medium tomato finely chopped and 1 tbsp of ground coriander, and  last add 2 cup of water and cooking for 5 minutes
5. Once lentil are cooked, crush them slightly add add the masala to it with salt to taste and fresh coriander
6. Cook for 3 minutes until combined

name: Stretched Breadsticks
text:
Recipe ID: grissini_stirati_merged
Name: Stretched Breadsticks

Ingredients:
- Flour 3000
- Water 1200
- Brewer's yeast 120
- Extra virgin olive oil 30
- Malt 30
- Salt 60

Steps:
1. Knead all the ingredients according to the kneading times, prepare the wet boards and spread the dough formed into 2.050 kg loaves with the seam facing down. Press out the air well and let rise lightly for about 60 minutes. At this point, cut the loaves into strips, then let rise for about 20 - 30 minutes in a proofing chamber, preferably on a wire rack. Let rise for 20 - 30 minutes in a 13-15 minute chamber.
2. Bake at a temperature of 240°C with steam and with the dampers closed for (No bottom x end 22° T.I. 4 E.)

Other details:
Tempi temp. finale:: 25 - 26°C
Tempi imp. (spirale):: 7M in 1° vel. 3M in 2° vel.

name: Spicy Tuna
text:
Recipe ID: spicy_tuna_merged
Name: Spicy Tuna

Ingredients:
- For the sauce
- 50g Sesame oil
- 10g Rice vinegar
- 7.5g Sriracha sauce
- 5g Sichimi
- 0.8g xantana
- For the Spelt
- 30g Fine salt
- 200g Spelt
- For the tuna
- Tuna
- Nasturtium leaves large 8cm

Steps:
1. Blend all the ingredients together using a hand blender.
2. Mix the salt and the water.
3. Brine the spelt in the salt water over night.
4. The next day pass the spelt and dry on a cloth.
5. Dry on absorbent paper.
6. Store in airtight container.
7. Trim, cut into pieces and vacuum.
8. Freeze.
9. Dice into 0.5cm x 0.5cm cubes.
10. Portion at 20g
11. Mix 20g of the tuna with 5g of the spelt and the marinade.
12. Season with salt spoon into the nasturtium leaf

Other details:

name: Smoked Miso Butter
text:
Recipe ID: smoked_miso_butter_merged
Name: Smoked Miso Butter

Ingredients:
- 250g kitchen butter
- 150g filtered water
- 10g miso paste
- 1g gellaspressa

Steps:
1. Ideal 'smoking butter rig' - half gastro tray, as well as the perforated tray to fit. Slice butter long ways into 3 pieces. You should have 3 even rectangles of butter. Lay evenly across the perforated gastro and put in the blast chiller for 30 minutes. In remaining half of the gastro, cover the bottom with wood chips. Pull butter tray out of blast chiller.
2. 'Flame on,' light up wood chips and place frozen-butter tray on top and cover with foll.
3. Put the whole smoking rig onto a bed of ice to chill the tray, so that the butter does not melt. Leave for 30 mins. Weigh out 150g boiling water (from the coffee machine) and madd miso. Hand blend in smoked butter and finish with gellaspressa.

Other details:

name: Chicken Stock
text:
Recipe ID: fondo_de_pollo_es_parsed
Name: Chicken Stock

Ingredients:
- 25 ON-THE-VINE TOMATOES.
- 8 CHINESE SHALLOTS.
- 12 YELLOW CHICKENS.
- 6 KG CHICKEN CARCASSES.
- 6 HENS.
- 6KG HAM BONES.
- 120 LITERS WATER
- 2kg CARROTS.

Steps:
1. a) Chop the chickens and hens, removing the insides.

3. c) Put all the ingredients into the pot and bring to a boil.

5. e) Strain, degrease, and reduce by half.

name: Kombucha Base
text:
Recipe ID: kombucha_base:_merged
Name: Kombucha Base

Ingredients:
- 12 g Tea
- 1 L Water
- 12 g Coffee
- 100 g Sugar

Steps:
1. Kombucha base:
2. Kombucha base: Place all ingredients in a pot, bring to a boil, and let steep for 45 minutes. Filter through a fine sieve and reduce the starter liquid to 30°C. Adding the kombucha directly runs the risk of the SCOBY dying from thermal shock.
3. Remove 80% of the liquid (already kombucha, or fermented sweet tea). Leave the old liquid (kombucha) to use as a starter. Add the sweet tea and gently place the SCOBY on top of the mixture. Cover with cheesecloth and store in a warm place until it completes its cycle and needs to be fed again.

Remove 80% of the liquid (already kombucha, or fermented sweet tea). Leave the old liquid (kombucha) to use as a starter. Add the sweet tea and gently place the SCOBY on top of the mixture. Cover with cheesecloth and store in a warm place until it completes its cycle and needs to be fed again.

text:
Recipe ID: white_chocolate_and_matcha_merged
Name: White Chocolate And Matcha

Ingredients:
- For the matcha base
- 130ml water
- 20g matcha
- 0.25g citric acid
- 0.5g salt
- For the matcha mousse
- 130g base
- 1.5 leaves gold gelatin
- 180g white chocolate
- 410g whipped cream
- For the white chocolate air
- 720ml milk
- 240g white chocolate
- 5g lecithin
- For the Yogurt sable
- 55g flour
- 25g butter
- 28g sugar
- 15g yopol
- For caramelized white chocolate
- 60 g powder
- 40 g white chocolate

Steps:
1. 1. Infuse water and lesser quality matcha, salt and citric acid for 5 minutes
2. 2. Pass
3. 1. Heat base and add gelatin.
4. 2. Add 5g gvoton.
5. 3. Melt white chocolate and blitz
6. 4. When cool fold in semi whipped cream
7. 1. Combine and blitz with a hand blender to form air bubbles
8. 2. Spoon into a lined plastic box and blast chill
9. 3. Keep in the blaster for service
10. 1. Using the Kenwood cream the butter and sugar
11. 2. Add the dry ingredients
12. 3. Spread on a silpat and bake in the oven for 15 minutes at 120 degrees, 0% humidity and fan 3
13. 4. Freeze and blitz
14. 1. Roast the white chocolate in the oven at 160 degrees and blend mates
15. 2. Keep in the freezer
16. 3. Mix 60 g powder and 40g white chocolate to make the powder ready for service

name: Steamed Milk Sponge
text:
Recipe ID: steamed_milk_sponge_merged
Name: Steamed Milk Sponge

Ingredients:
- 3 WHOLE EGGS
- 225 CASTER SUGAR
- 1 VANILLA SCRAPED
- 175G T45 FLOUR
- 40G BUFFALO MILK POWDER
- 4G BAKING POWDER
- 120G WHOLE MILK
- 55G MELTED BUTTER, WARM BUT NOT HOT

Steps:
1. WHISK EGGS, SUGAR AND VANILLA ON KITCHENAID TO A SABAYON
2. WHISK TOGETHOR FLOUR, BAKING POWDER AND MILK POWDER
3. ADD MILK TO SABAYON AND WHISK TOGETHOR
4. ADD DRY INGREDIENTS AND MIX GENTLY
5. ADD MELTED BUTTER AND MIX TOGETHOR
6. DO NOT OVERMIX
7. STORE IN PIPING BAGS IN THE FRIDGE
8. FOR SERVICE PIPE 25G INTO SPRAYED RING MOULDS ON A SILPAT
9. STEAM AT 100C FULL FAN FOR 16 MINUTES
10. STORE IN A BUTTERBOX STILL WARM ONCE TRIMMED

name: Apricot Jam Crostata
text:
Recipe ID: apricot_jam_crostata_merged
Name: Apricot Jam Crostata

Ingredients:
- FOR THE PASTRY
- Butter: 150 g
- 00 Flour: 300 g
- Eggs (medium): 2
- Sugar: 130 g
- Lemons: 1 (zest)
- Salt: 1 pinch
- FOR FILLING
- Apricot jam: 600 g
- FOR BRUSHING
- Eggs (medium): 1

Steps:
1. 1 Prepare the pastry with the quantities indicated on the side, according to the recipe on page 284. After letting the dough rest in the fridge for at least half an hour, turn on the oven to 180°C (350°F) ventilated and roll out two-thirds of the pastry into a sheet about 3-4 mm thick, with which you will line a rectangular mold of 20x28 cm (or a round one for pies with a diameter of 20 cm). Prick with the tines of a fork and, with the remaining pastry, create strips using a knife or the pastry cutter. Then pour the jam into the pastry shell and level it with a spoon.
2. 2 Brush the edges of the cake with the beaten egg and place the strips on the surface, forming a diamond grid. Brush these too, then bake for about 45 minutes. Once removed from the oven, let the crostata cool in the mold before serving it on a serving dish sprinkled with powdered sugar.

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★
Preparazione:: 20'
Cottura:: 45'
Dosi:: 6 persone

- 1 tsp mustard seeds
- ½ tsp of hing
- 1 tsp of coriander powder
- 1 tsp of cumin seeds
- 10 curry leaves
- 1 garlic chop
- 1 green chilli chopped
- 1 tsp turmeric powder
- 2 red onion slice
- 4 medium size potato pre-boiled
- salt to taste
- chopped coriander

Steps:

2. Cook over low fire
3. Once everything it's nice and toast slightly mash the mix and finish with chopped coriander

name: Cantucci And Vin Santo
text:
Recipe ID: cantucci_e_vin_santo_merged
Name: Cantucci And Vin Santo

Ingredients:
- Butter: 100 g
- Flour 00: 500 g
- Baking powder: 4 g
- Unpeeled almonds: 250 g
- Salt: 1 pinch
- Eggs: 4 + 1 yolk
- Granulated sugar: 280 g
- FOR BRUSHING
- Eggs: 1

Steps:
1. Preheat the oven to 190°C. When it has reached the temperature, toast the almonds arranged on a baking sheet for 3-4 minutes, then remove and let them cool.
2. Then proceed with the dough: put the 4 whole eggs and the yolk with a pinch of salt and granulated sugar in a mixer (or in a large bowl) and whisk. Add the melted and lukewarm butter and mix, then incorporate the flour sifted with the baking powder. Mix all the ingredients: the result will be a crumbly and soft mixture to which you will add the almonds. Transfer everything to a floured work surface and compact it by hand to obtain a uniform ball.
3. Divide the dough into 2-3 balls of the same size and work them to obtain logs about 30 cm long (with 2 you will get larger biscuits, with 3 smaller biscuits), which you will place on a baking sheet covered with baking paper. Brush them with the lightly beaten egg and bake for 20 minutes in a hot oven at 190°C. Then remove the logs, let them cool for a few minutes and cut them diagonally, obtaining biscuits about 1-1.5 cm thick. Arrange them on the baking sheet and put everything back in the oven at 170°C for about 15 minutes. At that point, once cold, the cantucci will be ready to be enjoyed, naturally accompanied by a good glass of vin santo.

Other details:
Difficoltà: Difficoltà: **
Cottura: Cottura: 35'
Preparazione: Preparazione: 25'
Dosi: Dosi: 10 persone

name: Tomato And Kimchi Sauce
text:
Recipe ID: salsa_de_tomate_con_kimuchi_es_parsed
Name: Tomato And Kimchi Sauce

Ingredients:
- 12 kg chopped ripe vine tomatoes
- 7 carrots
- 25 white onions
- 1kg garlic cloves
- 5 liters chicken stock
- 4 palm sugar (tablets)
- 300g Sherry vinegar

Steps:
1. a) Chop all the vegetables into small dice.
2. b) Add in this order: garlic, onion, carrot and lastly the tomatoes (sauté the vegetables well).
3. d) When everything is well sautéed, add the chicken stock + palm sugar + Sherry vinegar and let it cook over medium heat for 2 hours.
4. e) Finally, add the kimuchi and adjust the salt. Then blend in a Thermomix for 3 minutes until a smooth sauce is obtained (adjust seasoning).

name: Rice Chips
text:
Recipe ID: "chips_di_riso"_merged
Name: Rice Chips

Ingredients:
- Japanese sushi rice 200
- mirin 50
- soy sauce 30
- mineral water 150

Steps:
1. Wash the rice and leave it in a chinois under the pressure of cold water, making sure that the water rises with a certain transparency from the chinois; drain well.
2. Place the rice in a cooking bag for steaming along with all the listed ingredients and vacuum seal completely.
3. Steam in the oven at 100°C or in boiling water for about 25 minutes; cool.
4. Open the bag and slice.
5. Fry in oil at 140°C until golden brown, dry and serve.

name: Coffee Cake
text:
Recipe ID: coffee_cake_merged
Name: Coffee Cake

Ingredients:
- FOR THE BASE
- Sugar: 220 g
- Hazelnut flour: 150 g
- All-purpose flour: 75 g
- Potato starch: 75 g
- Butter: 250 g
- Eggs (medium): 6
- Instant coffee: 10 g
- Baking powder: 1 sachet
- FOR THE COFFEE CREAM
- Milk: 500 ml
- Butter: 250 g
- Granulated sugar: 200 g
- Eggs (medium): 4 yolks
- Gelatin sheets: 20 g
- Instant coffee: 20 g
- Fresh cream: 500 ml
- Powdered sugar: 50 g
- FOR THE COFFEE SYRUP
- Instant coffee: 10 g
- Hot water: 100 ml
- Sugar: as needed

Steps:
1. Start with the base, creaming the butter and yolks, one at a time, without stopping beating. Then add the instant coffee, which you have previously dissolved in a tablespoon of boiling water. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form and, while still beating, gradually add the remaining sugar.
2. Pour the butter and yolk mixture into a large bowl where you will add the toasted hazelnut flour, all-purpose flour, potato starch and sifted baking powder, soften everything with two tablespoons of whipped egg whites, then gently fold in the rest of the egg whites. Pour everything into a 24 cm diameter cake tin that has been previously buttered and floured and bake at 180°C (350°F) for 45-50 minutes (do the toothpick test to check for doneness). Remove the base from the oven when it is cooked and unmold it once it is lukewarm.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the coffee cream. Soak the gelatin sheets in very cold water until softened and pour the milk and yolks into a saucepan. Bring to just below boiling point, then add the granulated sugar, instant coffee and butter in cubes, then mix, simmer for 2 minutes, turn off the heat and pour the cream into a wide, shallow container. Cover the cream with plastic wrap, pressing it onto the surface, to prevent it from forming a skin. Put it in the refrigerator to cool and thicken for 3-4 hours. When the cream is cold, gelatinous and compact, process it with the blades of a mixer to make it creamy again (if there are lumps, use a sieve) and gently mix it with the cream, whipped with the powdered sugar, then put the mixture in the refrigerator for at least half an hour.
4. Dissolve the instant coffee in 100 ml of boiling water (or prepare 100 ml of coffee with a moka pot) and sweeten it with sugar (quantity as desired). Let the syrup cool.
5. Cut the cake base in half and soak the bottom surface with half of the syrup, then spread plenty of cream on it and cover with the other half of the base, whose surface you will soak with the remaining syrup. Cover the entire cake with cream. With what is left over, you can fill a piping bag and decorate the cake, which you should leave in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★★★
Preparazione:: 240'
Cottura:: 60'
Dosi:: 10 persone

name: Celariac Ice Cream
text:
Recipe ID: celariac_ice_cream_merged
Name: Celariac Ice Cream

Ingredients:
- 400g thinly sliced celeriac
- 400ml milk
- 200ml double cream
- 50g sugar
- 70g trimoline
- 35g milk powder
- 130g egg yolks

Steps:
1. Trim the skin off the celeriac and slice thinly
2. sous vide in a large bag and place in pan of boiling water, cook until soft
3. Blend celeriac and set aside over ice
4. Place milk, cream, milk powder and sugars in a pan and bring to 60c
5. Once at 60c start gradually adding to the egg yolk, string constantly until all incorporated
6. Weight off 700ml of the egg yolk mixture and 300g of the celeriac puree
7. Blend until smooth, pass through chinois and set into two paco jets

name: Fresh Egg Pasta
text:
Recipe ID: pasta_fresca_all'uovo_merged
Name: Fresh Egg Pasta

Ingredients:
- Flour (soft wheat): 400 g
- Eggs (large): 4
- Salt: ½ teaspoon

Steps:
1. Every time I'm about to prepare fresh pasta, I remember my mother-in-law who spent entire summer afternoons, in the heat of the South, pulling pasta to feed dozens of people. She worked with a very long rolling pin - I still wonder how she managed to handle it with such mastery - and obtained a very thin sheet, almost transparent, which she considered ready only when it fell from both sides of the table, as if she herself, the table, was an image of the ancient culinary wisdom of our country.
2. Sift and arrange the flour in a fountain shape on the work surface (or in a large bowl), form a well in the center and break the eggs into it, one at a time, that you have kept at room temperature. Add the salt.
3. Starting from the inside, mix the eggs with a fork or spoon, gradually taking the flour from the edges. When the egg is consistent enough, knead the dough with your hands, from the outside in, incorporating all the flour. If the dough does not bind, add one or two tablespoons of lukewarm water and continue to knead it until it is smooth and compact. Wrap the resulting dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for about 1 hour in a cool, dry place. At that point, soft and elastic, it will be ready to be rolled out.
4. Flour the work surface and flatten your dough ball with your fingers. One of the best techniques for rolling out the dough is to hold one end still with one hand, roll the other onto the rolling pin and slide it. Repeat the same movement, turning the dough a quarter turn each time. When you have reached the right thickness (0.5 mm), you can give the pasta the shape you want.
5. For tagliatelle, tagliolini or pappardelle, flour the dough, then roll it up on itself. Cut the roll into many slices of different widths depending on the chosen format: from 5 to 7 millimeters for tagliatelle; 2-3 for tagliolini and 1.5-2 centimeters for pappardelle. Once cut, immediately unroll the single roll to prevent it from sticking, and place it on a floured surface. To obtain quadrucci, excellent with meat broth, overlap strips of floured pasta 1 cm wide; with a knife cut squares about a centimeter on a side. For lasagna, take a rolling wheel and cut rectangles of 20 centimeters by 14, or the size that best suits the pan you will use for their preparation. Simply place a strip of filling on the rectangle of dough and roll it up to obtain the cannelloni. Nothing is thrown away from the pasta: if some strips are left over, you can use them in small pieces and here are the maltagliati!

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★
Preparazione: 15'

name: Dou Hua
text:
Recipe ID: dou_hua_parsed
Name: Dou Hua

Ingredients:
- 100 G Soy bean
- 1000 ML Filter Water
- 1000 ML soy milk
- 1 L Soy Milk
- 5 g Gypsum powder
- 5 g Corn Flour
- 40 ML still water

Steps:
1. Soak soy bean with water overnight (12hrs)
2. Drain next day, 100g soy bean (before soak) + 500ml filtered water
3. Blitz and squeeze the soy beans
4. Bring to boil, pass through muslin cloth. Cool down and keep it for the next day
5. Bring the soy milk to boiled then pass through muslin again
6. Cool the soy milk down to 82C (while waiting mix the gypsum powder and corn flour and still water in a bowl)
7. mix the soy milk and the gypsum solution together and cover it with cling flim. Let it set for 30min at room temperature.

Other details:
Total Time: 48 min
NOTES: Have soy milk ready, but make dou hua daily for freshness

text:

Name: Bignè N° 1

Ingredients:
- Water 1000
- Butter 400
- Flour 160W 600
- Eggs as needed
- Salt 1

Steps:
1. Bring the water to a boil with the salt and butter, add the flour and continue to cook until the dough pulls away cleanly from the pot. Place in a planetary mixer and when the dough reaches around 50°C, begin to add the eggs.
2. Form on lightly greased baking sheets and bake at a temperature of 200 - 210°C with the vent open for 15 minutes.

name: Mushroom Dumpling
text:
Recipe ID: mushroom_dumpling_parsed
Name: Mushroom Dumpling

Ingredients:
- 750 g Fresh Shiitake
- 500 g Oyster Mushroom
- 160 g Dried Shiitake
- 600 g Mushroom Water
- 30 g Diced ginger
- 200 ml Shaoxin Wine
- 150 ml Light Soy
- 400 g Lotus root grated
- Oil

Steps:
1. Cut mushrooms to rough 1cm size
2. Blitz the rehydrated shiitake coarsely
3. In a hot pan, fry the diced ginger
4. Once nicely browned, add blitzed rehydrated shiitake
5. Then add chopped fresh shiitake and chopped Oyster mushroom
6. Add and pinch of salt, then further to cook until wilted
7. Add shao xin wine and let it evaporate
8. Add soy sauce and taste mushroom
9. Add grated lotus root and cook to combine
10. Add Mushroom water and let it cook down and form a good consistency

Other details:
Dried Shiitake Note: Soak in 600g water to rehydrate
Mushroom Water Note: or veggie dashi
CHILLI OIL DRESSING: 1:1= Sichuan chilli oil: Tiger dressing
Dumpling: 10g dough, 20g fillings
Each Portion: 1 tbsp chilli oil dressing, 1/2 tsp chilli pulp
Portion Size: 3 Piece dumplings
Note: dumpling skin not to flap 水餃皮縮口要窄才會挺
Need photo on this recipe: None

name: Pita Bread
text:
Recipe ID: pita_bread_merged
Name: Pita Bread

Ingredients:
- Water 1440 Gr
- Sugar 60 Gr
- Olive oil 130 Gr
- Fresh yeast 300 Gr
- Baking powder 50 Gr
- Flour 1920 Gr
- Salt 65 gr
- Pepper 5 Gr
- Thyme leaves 5 Gr
- Oregano 10 gr

Steps:
1. Put the oil, sugar, yeast, thyme, oregano in lukewarm water (28 degrees) and mix.
2. Add the flour, olive oil and pepper.
3. Roll into a ball and let rise for 1 hour.
4. Divide the dough in the base, place the dough on top and let rise for 1 hour.
5. Once it has risen to twice its original volume, cut into 100 gr pieces, make balls and store in the fridge with a damp cloth on top.
6. Roll out like a pizza with the help of flour if needed, but without manipulating the dough too much.
7. Cook in the griddle at 220°C and cook for about 3m on each side. (if the dough swells during cooking, flatten it with a spatula).
8. Place on a baking sheet with parchment paper and freeze.
9. Do not let rise for more than an hour.
10. Do not leave out of the fridge for more than an hour

Other details:

name: Egg Cream Liqueur
text:
Recipe ID: liquore_di_crema_all'uovo_merged
Name: Egg Cream Liqueur

Ingredients:
- Pure alcohol: 75 ml
- Cognac: 25 ml
- Whole milk: 300 ml
- Dry Marsala wine: 25 ml
- Very fresh eggs: 1 yolk
- Vanillin: 1 packet
- Powdered sugar: 100 g

Steps:
1. Whisk the egg yolk with the powdered sugar and vanillin packet in a bowl until you obtain a thick and smooth cream. Then add the alcohol a little at a time, the cognac and the Marsala, continuing to mix. Finally, add the milk.
2. Thicken the cream by heating it in a bain-marie and continuing to stir, until you no longer feel the consistency of the sugar (it will take at least 10 minutes). Pay attention to the water in the bain-marie: it should only simmer, not boil. Otherwise you could cook the eggs, ruining everything.
3. Let the liqueur cool and bottle it, storing it in a cool and dark place, for example in the refrigerator: the eggs have been "cooked" and the alcohol helps with preservation but, unlike commercial products, our liqueur does not contain preservatives, so caution is never too much. Before tasting it, remember to shake the bottle to mix it properly.

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★
Cottura: 10'
Preparazione: 10'
Dosi: 1 litro

translated_from: it

- Seasonality: Year-Round

Thicken the cream by heating it in a bain-marie and continuing to stir, until you no longer feel the consistency of the sugar (it will take at least 10 minutes). Pay attention to the water in the bain-marie: it should only simmer, not boil. Otherwise you could cook the eggs, ruining everything.

Let the liqueur cool and bottle it, storing it in a cool and dark place, for example in the refrigerator: the eggs have been "cooked" and the alcohol helps with preservation but, unlike commercial products, our liqueur does not contain preservatives, so caution is never too much. Before tasting it, remember to shake the bottle to mix it properly.

Name: Paella Sofrito

Ingredients:

- Salt
- toasted Hazelnut
- water

name: Rabbit And Pork Dumpling
text:
Recipe ID: rabbit_and_pork_dumpling_parsed
Name: Rabbit And Pork Dumpling

Ingredients:
- 500 gr Pork shoulder
- 250 gr Pork back fat
- 500 gr Rabbit farmed
- 4 # Dried Shitake (rehydrated )
- 50 gr Celery
- 20 gr Coriander stalks
- 20 g Salt
- 40 Soy
- 20 Sugar
- 75 Sesame Paste
- 45 Onion Fat
- 50 Corn starch

Steps:
1. To make onion fat ,rendered the pork fat first ,than cooked sliced onion and garlic together on medium heat untill
2. onion get golden colour .Strain and keep it cool .
3. Break the rabit and take meat off from the bone .Try not to waste any part of the meat and remove all meat as
4. much as you can . Cut all the meat on 5mm cubes in the same manor ..
5. Pork meat and Pork Fat need to be cut on the same manor .
6. Place all meat in mixing bowl an add sesoning mix well for 30 sec
7. Cut Rehadrated shitake ,celery ,coriander stalks in to the small bronoise and add in to meat mix .keep refrigerated
8. You can use meat mix maximum 3 days ,so you need to stay on top of your orderings and preps .
9. Make the Beijin boiled style dumpling style dough and make them in to the dumplings! ( Approx 8gr of dought 20gr meat
10. To boil dumplings you will need to cook then for a 7min in slightly salty water

Other details:
Total Time: 1 hour

- Dietary: Nut-Free, Dairy-Free

- Seasonality: Year-Round

name: Baba Limoncello Di Capri
text:
Recipe ID: baba_limoncello_di_capri_merged
Name: Baba Limoncello Di Capri

Ingredients:
- Ingredients:
- For the baba:
- - 100 g Flour
- - 2 g Salt
- - 6 g Yeast
- - 6 g Sugar
- - 2 Eggs
- - 25 g Butter
- For the syrup:
- - 500 g Water
- - 1 g Granulated sugar
- - 1 Orange zest
- - 1 Limoncello zest
- - 300 ml limoncello
- For the pastry cream
- - 800 gr Cream
- - 250 gr Milk
- - 300 gr Sugar
- - 80 gr Egg yolks
- Cornstarch
- Vanilla
- Fresh sliced fruit

Steps:
1. Preparation:
2. For the baba:
3. - Mix all ingredients except the butter
4. - Knead
5. - When the dough comes away from the sides of the mixer, add the melted lukewarm butter.
6. - Mix. Cover with a cloth and let rise.
7. - When the dough has doubled in volume, break it.
8. - Divide the dough halfway up in the buttered molds, by hand or with a pastry bag.
9. - Flatten, let rise in a warm oven (30-35 minutes)
10. - The dough should double in about 25 minutes.
11. - Bake in the oven at 200-220° for about 25 minutes.
12. - The baking time depends on the pans, color and drying.
13. - Unmold the babas as soon as they are cooked.
14. For the syrup:
15. - Mix all the syrup ingredients.
16. - Bring to a boil.
17. - Let infuse.
18. - Immerse the babas in the syrup, turn them with a slotted spoon.
19. - Check that the babas are well soaked.
20. - Arrange the babas on a wire rack to drain.

Other details:

- Mix. Cover with a cloth and let rise.
- When the dough has doubled in volume, break it.
- Divide the dough halfway up in the buttered molds, by hand or with a pastry bag.
- Flatten, let rise in a warm oven (30-35 minutes)
- The dough should double in about 25 minutes.
- Bake in the oven at 200-220° for about 25 minutes.
- The baking time depends on the pans, color and drying.
- Unmold the babas as soon as they are cooked.
For the syrup:
- Mix all the syrup ingredients.
- Bring to a boil.
- Let infuse.
- Immerse the babas in the syrup, turn them with a slotted spoon.
- Check that the babas are well soaked.
- Arrange the babas on a wire rack to drain.

name: Ham Yum Yum Sauce Only For Freezer (10)
text:
Recipe ID: ham_yum_yum_sauce_only_for_freezer_(10)_merged
Name: Ham Yum Yum Sauce Only For Freezer (10)

Ingredients:
- Ginger 400 g x4
- Garlic 60 g
- Chinkiang vinegar 120 g
- Doubanjiang 160 g
- Fermented Red Chili (chopped) 160 g
- Dried Shrimp (soaked for 15min and chopped) 160 g
- Rock Sugar 60 g
- Crab oil 200 g

Steps:
1. Finely chopped the Ginger and Garlic as you would for GSO.
2. Put this in the thermomix with rock sugar, cover with oil and cook it 100c for 6 minutes at first check and you want it to be cooked down and soft
3. the timing will depends on the quantity you put in
4. When fully cooked drained the the oil and reserve
5. Toss in the thermomix, put douban jiang chopped fermented chili and dried shrimp, blitz it till fine and the cooked down garlic and ginger, and vinegar
6. When fully blitz, still with texture you want to cook it down a bit more to remove moisture so that your spring roll doesn't get soggy

name: Malted Barley Ice Cream
text:
Recipe ID: malted_barley_ice_cream_merged
Name: Malted Barley Ice Cream

Ingredients:
- 125g pearl barley
- 1000g whole milk
- 50g milk powder
- 70g pasteurised egg yolks
- 135g golden caster sugar
- 70g malt syrup
- 50g dried brown bread

Steps:
1. Roast pearl parley at 200'c for 20 minutes, until dark brown, set aside to cool
2. Warm milk and milk powder to 52'c
3. Blend the yolks, malt syrup and sugar together, whisk into the warm milk.
4. Continue stirring, warm to 70'c and hold for 10 minutes at this temperature.
5. Chill over ice and add the dried bread and cooled barley, infuse for 12 hours.
6. Once infused pass then for every litre of base add 60g of sour cream. Churn.

Other details:

name: Confit Bamboo
text:
Recipe ID: confit_bamboo_parsed
Name: Confit Bamboo

Ingredients:
- 1kg	Bamboo
- 60g	Sugar
- 30g	Salt
- 40 g	Piece of ginger
- 100g 	Oil from Ginger Spring Onion Sauce

Steps:
1. Remove harder outer husk of bamboo and peel the bamboo shoot stem.
2. Slice Bamboo 1 cm thick coins.
3. Combine all ingredients above and line flat in a vac pack bag.
4. Ensure each bag contains Ginger Spring Onion Oil and ginger to infuse into bamboo.
5. 3 minutes in Dumplings steamer.
6. Should maintain a crunch and not mushy.
7. Blast Chill.

name: Tofu Filling
text:
Recipe ID: tofu_filling_parsed
Name: Tofu Filling

Ingredients:
- 150g Pressed Tofu (step1)
- 85g Chopped Mustard Green (step2)
- 85g Wilted Spinach (step3)
- 10g Superior Soy
- 5g Aged Soy
- 12g Sesame Oil
- 1g White Pepper
- 1g Maldon Salt

Steps:
1. Press Tofu ( Clean Bean ) for two hours you should have a loss of 20% of the Weight
2. Chop and Fry the Mustard greens for a bit, just to lose some of the water content, you should have a 30% loss of the weight at the end
3. Wash the Spinach, dry it and wilt it in a pan so that its cooked and the water of spinach has sort of evaporated
4. Squeeze all the water out of the spinach with a J-cloth
5. Chop the pressed tofu, Chop the Spinach, mix them together and add the seasonings
6. Add The chopped preserved mustard to the mix. taste it add salt if needed.

Other details:
Total Time: 45min
Total Batch Weight: 349
Total Portion: 17.45
1 portion: 20g

name: Mimosa Cake
text:
Recipe ID: torta_mimosa_merged
Name: Mimosa Cake

Ingredients:
- FOR THE SPONGE CAKE
- Flour: 200 g
- Potato Starch: 40 g
- Eggs: 4 + 8 egg yolks
- Sugar: 220 g
- Salt: as needed
- Vanilla: 1 pod
- FOR THE PASTRY CREAM
- Flour: 55 g
- Fresh Whole Milk: 300 ml
- Fresh Liquid Cream: 300 ml
- Eggs: 8 egg yolks
- Vanilla: ½ pod
- Sugar: 200 g
- FOR THE LIQUEUR SYRUP
- Water: 100 ml
- Cointreau: 50 ml
- Sugar: 50 g
- FOR THE WHIPPED CREAM
- Fresh Liquid Cream: 200 ml
- Powdered Sugar: 20 g
- Butter: 300 g
- Flour 00: 150 g
- Potato Starch: 150 g
- Baking Powder: 1 packet
- Lemons: 1 (zest)
- Eggs: 8 egg yolks + 4 egg whites
- Vanillin: 1 packet
- Sugar: 300 g
- Salt: 1 pinch
- FOR SPRINKLING
- Powdered Sugar: 2 tablespoons

Steps:
1. To make this cake you will need two sponge cake layers approximately 22 cm wide. Therefore, follow the quantities indicated, halving them if you only have one oven and are therefore forced to bake one sponge cake at a time. Repeat the procedure indicated on page 282 twice. While the sponge cakes are cooling, dedicate yourself to the pastry cream, according to the recipe on page 280. When it is ready, let it cool in a shallow, wide, and cold container, covering it on the surface with plastic wrap.
2. Prepare the syrup, dissolving the sugar in a saucepan together with the water and liqueur, then let it cool. Whip the very cold cream with a mixer; as soon as it begins to swell, add the powdered sugar and finish whipping, then put everything in the refrigerator. When the pastry cream is cold, put it in a bowl, soften it by working it with a spatula, and gently add the whipped cream, except for two tablespoons that you will set aside.
3. The sponge cakes should be cold enough to remove the dark outer part. With a long-bladed knife, cut one of the two horizontally, obtaining three discs of equal thickness, while from the other cut slices with a thickness of 1 cm, which you will then cut into 3 strips to be subsequently reduced into cubes.
4. It is time to assemble the cake - if you have one, use an adjustable steel ring. Soak the first sponge cake disc with the syrup, then spread a layer of sweetened whipped cream and, finally, a layer of about 1 cm of pastry cream mixed with cream. Then place the second disc and repeat everything from the beginning. Once you reach the third disc, remove the steel ring and cover the surface and sides of the cake with the remaining cream. Then move on to the decoration, making the sponge cake cubes adhere to the cream, which will act as a glue. Then put the cake in the refrigerator, preferably covered with a glass or plastic dome.
5. Turn on the oven to 180°C. Separate the yolks from the whites, keeping 4 of the latter aside.
6. Put the butter, half of the sugar, and the vanillin in a large bowl or inside a mixer and mix until creamy. Then mix in the 8 egg yolks one at a time, taking care to add the next only when the previous one has been completely incorporated (in the mixer you can put everything together). When you have obtained a light, creamy and lump-free mixture, add the grated lemon zest, the flour sifted with the potato starch and the baking powder.
7. In another container with high edges, whisk the 4 egg whites until stiff with a pinch of salt, then, continuing to whisk, add the remaining half of the sugar. Gently incorporate the egg whites into the previous mixture, mixing from bottom to top to incorporate air.
8. Grease and flour a cake tin (if you have one, a springform pan) with a diameter of 28 cm and pour the mixture into it. Bake at 180°C for at least 50 minutes. Check for doneness with a toothpick: if you pull it out completely dry, the cake will be cooked and ready to be taken out of the oven. When it has cooled, place it on a serving dish and sprinkle it with plenty of powdered sugar.

Other details:
Difficoltà: Media
Cottura: 50'
Preparazione: 20'
Dosi: 10 persone

- 1500g Caster sugar
- 100g Butter
- pinch salt
- 2000g Orange juice
- 4500g whipping cream

Steps:
1. In a large pot caramelise the sugar until all liquid and golden brown

4. add the whipping cream and bring back to simmer

name: Layers Of Mushroom
text:
Recipe ID: layers_of_mushroom_merged
Name: Layers Of Mushroom

Ingredients:
- For the Ganache
- 300g Double cream
- 200g White chocolate
- 50g Toasted yeast mushroom powder(leftover)
- Salt
- For mushroom stock
- 800g Mushroom stock
- 80g Dried shiitakes
- 200g Burnt onion
- 4g Dried kombu
- 4l Water
- For the mushroom jelly
- 200g Mushroom stock
- 1.2g Agar Agar
- For stock syrup
- 100g Water
- 100g Wasabi
- 80g Komsu
- 10g Liquid glucose
- 50g Large king oyster mushrooms
- 200g Stock syrup(recipe above)

Steps:
1. Bring the cream to the boil and pour over the chocolate, leave a minute and add the mushroom powder.
2. Blend in a stick blender
3. Pour into a paco jet container and cool in the fridge.
4. Once chilled pass in the paco jet twice until well aerated.
5. Transfer to silpat, using metal guides of 0.3cm and spread evenly over the silpat.
6. Once set cut into rectangles of 6cm x 3cm, grate the cut into rectangles.
7. Add all ingredients in stockpot being to the boil then simmer gently for one hour.
8. Pass the stock and keep the mushrooms.
9. Reduce further if necessary season with salt and reserve in fridge.
10. Separate the shiitakes and keep for pickling.

14. Pour into small rectangular tray and weigh
15. Once set cut into rectangles of 6cm x 3cm.

17. Reserve in container in fridge.

name: Spring Herb Mix
text:
Recipe ID: spring_herb_mix_parsed
Name: Spring Herb Mix

Ingredients:
- 40 g Cooked Glass noodles
- 50 g Roasted fennel
- 30 g Dill
- 30 g Wild garlic
- 20 g Spring onion
- 0.5 tsp Green sichuan oil 青花椒油
- 10 g Aged White Soy屏東白醬油
- 10 g Tong choi (magic cabbage)
- 0.5 tsp Kow Choi Oil
- 0.25 tsp White Pepper

Steps:
1. Cut the fennel to cube size, oil it gently
2. Roast the cubed fennel in josper for about 5min, keep an eye on it
3. Use a scissors to cut down thecooked glass noodles to 2cm lengths
4. Chop the spring onion to very fine rings
5. Slice the wild garlic really thin, and about 3cm long
6. Chop the dills to 2cm wide, do not include the end stems
7. In a mixing bowl, put in the weighed glass noodles
8. Season the glass noodles with Aged white soy, white pepper, kow choi oil and green sichuna oil
9. Taste, add a pinch of salt if it needs it
10. Roll and pan fry like xian bing and serve with salted plum juice mirin

Other details:
Total Time: nan min
NOTES: Make fresh batch everyday. DO NOT use any leftovers overnight. It's a spring xian bing, it needs to be fresh!!!! Always make small batch only. Glass noodles should always be 30% of the total herbs weight

Classifications:
- Dish Type: Side Dish
- Cuisine: Chinese
- Difficulty: Level 2 (Intermediate / Professional)

- Dietary: Vegetarian, Vegan, Nut-Free, Dairy-Free, Alcohol-Free
- Occasion: Fine Dining / Plated
- Prep Style: Make-Ahead / Prep-Heavy
- Seasonality: Spring

name: Tuna Belly/Garum/Halophytes
text:
Recipe ID: ventreca_de_bonito__garum___halofitas._merged
Name: Tuna Belly/Garum/Halophytes

Ingredients:
- The tuna belly:
- 1 Tuna belly
- For the garum:
- 1 Kg fresh anchovies
- 20% salt
- The tuna belly:
- 1 Tuna belly.
- For the garum:
- 1 Kg. fresh anchovies
- 20% salt

Steps:
1. ELABORATION:
2. PREVIOUS NOTE:
3. The material for making the garum should be clean.
4. The percentage of salt used for the recipe is between 17 and 20% (1.7 to 2). The percentage of coarse salt ensures that no harmful microorganisms such as clostridium botulinum proliferate.
5. The tuna belly:
6. Clean the tuna belly of all types of impurities, blood or debris. Remove the viscera, membrane that covers the meat and the bones.
7. Make the pulp and bones and place in the salt mixture and square.
8. Keep for 6 hours and clean. Peel and remove the white membrane part.
9. Cut and square.
10. For the garum:
11. Cut the tuna belly from where the garum is going to be made to facilitate access to the enzymes that will carry out the proteolysis process.
12. Make layers of anchovies, salt and herbs to the container, pressing to leave the anchovies submerged in their own liquid.
13. Cover well and ferment for 10 days at 40°
14. Stir the mixture on the 7th day.
15. Strain through a fine filter and store in refrigeration.
16. FINISH AND PRESENTATION:
17. On a tray, spread the tuna belly loin with the garum and add the halophytes.

- Puff pastry
- Liquid egg yolk

Steps:
1. a) Separate the egg white from the yolk.
2. b) Roll out the puff pastry to the desired thickness.

name: Apple Strudel
text:
Recipe ID: strudel_di_mele_merged
Name: Apple Strudel

Ingredients:
- FOR THE DOUGH
- Lukewarm water: 100 ml
- Flour: 250 g
- Oil: 2 tablespoons
- Salt: 1 pinch
- Eggs (large): 1
- FOR THE FILLING
- Butter: 100 g
- Melted butter: 100 g
- Cinnamon powder: 2 teaspoons
- Lemons: 1 (grated zest)
- Golden Apples: 1.5 kg
- Breadcrumbs: 150 g
- Pine nuts: 50 g
- Rum: 4 tablespoons
- Sultanas: 100 g
- Sugar: 120 g
- FOR THE TOPPING
- Powdered sugar: as needed

Steps:
1. When I decided to leave the desk to move - me and my kitchen - into that space that lies within our lines, Asdrì was happy. And terrified. One night I woke up in a panic: what if it went wrong? What if I wasn't up to it? To the decline "what if..." I had to engage my head in something constructive, so I started making strudel: with puff pastry. Late in the morning I finally cut myself a slice inside there was my childhood, my land, my grandmother's teachings, years of dedication to learn how to do it like her. There was my passion for things that change shape, my love for food. There was me. Then yes, I understood that that was my path: my choice, and that it was time to make it.
2. Difficulty: ★★
3. Preparation: 70'
4. Cooking: 40'
5. Servings: 6 people
6. 1 Pour the flour in a fountain shape on a pastry board (or in a bowl) and add the egg, salt and oil. Knead vigorously, slowly adding enough water to make the dough consistent, smooth and elastic. When you are finished, form a ball, grease it with oil, cover it with plastic wrap and let it rest in a cool place for half an hour.
7. 2 Meanwhile, soak the raisins in rum or, if you prefer, in lukewarm water and toast the breadcrumbs in butter.
8. 3 Then peel the apples, remove the core and cut them first into four wedges, then into thin slices. In a large bowl, mix them with the squeezed raisins, cinnamon powder, sugar, pine nuts and grated lemon zest. When the ingredients are mixed, let it rest.

Other details:

One night I woke up in a panic: what if it went wrong? What if I wasn't up to it? To the decline "what if..." I had to engage my head in something constructive, so I started making strudel: with puff pastry. Late in the morning I finally cut myself a slice inside there was my childhood, my land, my grandmother's teachings, years of dedication to learn how to do it like her. There was my passion for things that change shape, my love for food. There was me. Then yes, I understood that that was my path: my choice, and that it was time to make it.
Difficulty: ★★
Preparation: 70'
Cooking: 40'
Servings: 6 people

1 Pour the flour in a fountain shape on a pastry board (or in a bowl) and add the egg, salt and oil. Knead vigorously, slowly adding enough water to make the dough consistent, smooth and elastic. When you are finished, form a ball, grease it with oil, cover it with plastic wrap and let it rest in a cool place for half an hour.
2 Meanwhile, soak the raisins in rum or, if you prefer, in lukewarm water and toast the breadcrumbs in butter.

3 Then peel the apples, remove the core and cut them first into four wedges, then into thin slices. In a large bowl, mix them with the squeezed raisins, cinnamon powder, sugar, pine nuts and grated lemon zest. When the ingredients are mixed, let it rest.

name: Fruit Skewers
text:
Recipe ID: spedini_di_frutta_merged
Name: Fruit Skewers

Ingredients:
- Bananas: 2
- Strawberries: 12
- Kiwi: 1
- Melon: ½
- Mint: 8 small leaves
- FOR COATING
- Dark chocolate: 100 g
- Hazelnut granules: 8 teaspoons
- Fresh cream: 80 ml

Steps:
1. Wash and clean the fruit, obtaining small pieces from each type to thread onto the skewer sticks. Using the appropriate tool, scoop out the melon pulp to obtain small balls, cut the kiwi into cubes, and the banana into rather thick slices. Leave the strawberries whole, only removing the green stem.
2. Chop the chocolate into small pieces and melt it in a bain-marie with the cream: the result will be a thick and creamy sauce that you can use either warm or cold.
3. Assemble the skewers alternating pieces of different fruit and ending with a mint leaf. Place 2 skewers on each plate, drizzle with the chocolate sauce and sprinkle with a teaspoon of hazelnut granules.

Other details:

name: Ash-Covered Meadow Cheese; For All
text:
Recipe ID: cendré_des_prés_tibio;_para_todos_merged
Name: Ash-Covered Meadow Cheese; For All

Ingredients:
- INGREDIENTS:
(For 16 people.)
- The almond milk:
- 50 g. raw Marcona almonds
- 100 ml. water
- The almond cheese:
- 100 g. almond milk
- 250 ml. water
- 2 g. iota
- 4 g. salt
- 150 ml. water
- 0.8 g. Penicillium candidum
- 75 g. almond milk

Steps:
1. ELABORATION:
2. The almond milk:
3. In an American blender. Grind the almond correctly with the water. Strain with a superbag and reserve the milk.
4. The almond cheese:
5. Put the almonds in a pressure cooker with water to cover and cook for 50 minutes from the release of steam. Reserve only the almonds.
6. In a pot, place water, IOTA powder, iota and at the same time, in a Thermomix, grind the cooked almond, almond milk and salt and heat to 80°C at speed 6. Add the gelatins which are at the same temperature until everything is well mixed.
7. Pour the mixture into a bowl previously sterilized with alcohol. When the temperature of the mixture drops to 30°C, add the Penicillium candidum and mix the whole thing well with gloves.
8. On a silpat, distribute circular molds of 8 cm in diameter, leaving a first amount of 50 g. in each mold and smooth it out. On this mixture, spread a thin layer of 1 mm thick of Penicillium tal. On this layer, incorporate another 50 g. of mixture in each mold.
9. (Reserve the remaining amount for a next step in the recipe)
10. Wait until the contents of the molds gel during approximately 1 hour at room temperature. Remove from the molds.
11. Mix the remaining amount mentioned above in a ratio of 1:1 with water. With this slightly lighter mixture, glaze the "cheeses".

Other details:

In an American blender. Grind the almond correctly with the water. Strain with a superbag and reserve the milk.
The almond cheese:

In a pot, place water, IOTA powder, iota and at the same time, in a Thermomix, grind the cooked almond, almond milk and salt and heat to 80°C at speed 6. Add the gelatins which are at the same temperature until everything is well mixed.
Pour the mixture into a bowl previously sterilized with alcohol. When the temperature of the mixture drops to 30°C, add the Penicillium candidum and mix the whole thing well with gloves.

On a silpat, distribute circular molds of 8 cm in diameter, leaving a first amount of 50 g. in each mold and smooth it out. On this mixture, spread a thin layer of 1 mm thick of Penicillium tal. On this layer, incorporate another 50 g. of mixture in each mold.

name: Jerusalem Artichoke Parfait
text:
Recipe ID: jerusalem_artichoke_parfait_merged
Name: Jerusalem Artichoke Parfait

Ingredients:
- 200G YOLK
- 200G SUGAR
- 50G GLUCOSE
- 1 VANILLA POD SCRAPED
- 125G MASCARPONE
- 275 JERUSALEM ARTICHOKE PUREE
- 200ML JERUSALEM ARTICHOKE OIL
- 200ML LIGHTLY WHIPPED CREAM
- 1 LEAF OF GELATIN

Steps:
1. FOR ARTICHOKE OIL TAKE EQUAL AMOUNTS OF J-CHOKE AND GRAPESEED OIL, GRATE THE J-CHOKES INTO A SOUS BAG AND COOK OVERNIGHT
2. FOR ARTICHOKE PUREE, PEEL AND THINLY SLICE ARTICHOKES ( PINCH OF ABSORBIC), PLACE INTO A HOT PAN WITH ALITTLE BIT OF WATER AND COOK PUREE INSTANTLY.
3. TAKE SUGAR, GLUCOSE AND A LITLE BIT OF WATER TO 121C
4. HAVE THE YOLKS ALREADY TURNING ON THE KITCHEN AID WITH THE VANILLA POD INSIDE
5. POUR THE SUGAR INTO THE YOLKS ONCE ITS HIT 121C AND WHILE THE PAN IS STILL HOT
6. DISSOLVE THE BLOOMED GELATIN AND POUR ON THE YOLKS
7. INCORPERATE THE ARTICHOKE OIL, PUREE AND THE MASCARPONE INTO A BOWL AND OVER ICE, HAVE THE WHIPPING CREAM WHIPPED AND ALSO ON ICE
8. ONCE YOUR BOMBE IS COLD, GENTLY FOLD IN YOUR ARTICHOKE MIXTURE, FOLLOWED BY YOUR WHIPPED CREAM
9. PLACE INTO LARGE SQUARE MOLD (900G)

Other details:

name: Crystallised Chocolate Truffles
text:
Recipe ID: crystallised_chocolate_truffles_merged
Name: Crystallised Chocolate Truffles

Ingredients:
- Crystallised chocolate:
- Caster Sugar: 750g
- Water: 150g
- Bicarb: 30g
- Coeur de Guanaja dark chocolate: 570g (chopped)
- Dark chocolate ganache
- Coeur de Guanaja: 580gr
- Nyango: 468gr
- Whipping cream: 780gr
- Inverted sugar: 140gr
- Butter: 240gr
- Blitz Maldon salt: 10gr
- Coating for truffles:
- Crystallised chocolate:
- Feuillantine:

Steps:
1. Cook the water and sugar until they reach 145°C.
2. Remove from the heat and stir in the chocolate and Bicarb.
3. Keep stirring until the mix crystallises and goes crumbly.
4. Use a steamer tray to divide the small and the big bits.
5. Store in the Dry store. (Label 1 month)
6. Melt both chocolate to 45°C.
7. Bring the cream and inverted sugar to boil.
8. Leave the cream to cool don to 90°C then add it to the chocolate in one time.
9. Mix with a spatula till fully incorporated. Finish with the hand-blender do not add any air.
10. Leave to cool down to 45°C then add the diced butter and the salt.
11. Mix well and leave to set and crystallise.
12. Portion at 5gr, roll as a ball and stick the crystallise room temperature at 15-17°C for 12h.
13. Fridge then deep in 700gr couverture, 140gr cocoa butter.
14. Keep in the fridge. (Label 1 week)

name: French Meringue
text:
Recipe ID: meringa_alla_francese_merged
Name: French Meringue

Ingredients:
- Eggs: 100 g of egg whites
- Sugar: 220 g
- Salt: 1 pinch
- Lemon: a few drops of juice

Steps:
1. Turn on the oven to 80-100°C. Separate all the egg whites and place them in a container with high sides, along with a pinch of salt and a third of the sugar. If you want to make the mixture shiny and reduce the strong smell of the egg, add a few drops of filtered lemon juice. With an electric mixer, whip the egg whites until very stiff peaks form and double in volume, then incorporate another third of the sugar. Then, with a spatula, add the last third, mixing gently from the bottom up, as if to incorporate air.
2. Insert the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a wide nozzle (smooth or serrated) and, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, form meringues with a diameter of 4-5 centimeters.
3. The meringues must dry more than cook, so leave them in the oven, at a low temperature, for at least 2 hours (at temperatures below 80°C, you could extend the cooking time to 4-6 hours). They must not take on color, so after the first hour, take a look: if they are yellowing, lower the temperature further and leave the door ajar, thus preventing the formation of humidity, the bitter enemy of meringues.

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★
Cottura: 120'
Preparazione: 15'
Dosi: 30 circa

name: Lobster And Pistachio
text:
Recipe ID: lobster_and_pistachio_merged
Name: Lobster And Pistachio

Ingredients:
- For the Lobster
- To cook lobster
- For the lobster oil
- Lobster shells
- Oil 1 litre
- For Pistachio base
- 1500ml veg stock CHICFER STOCK
- 200g pistachio
- 200g almonds
- 40g miso
- 100g rice vinegar
- 80g leeks
- 5g garlic
- 200g white onion

Steps:
1. PROCESS
2. 1. Store under wet towel in the fridge.
3. 2. Cook per day
4. 1. Break lobster at head. Reserve coral (if any) vacuum and freeze.
5. 2. Freeze heads or store accordingly to make oil
6. 3. Place a spoon under the shell of the lobster and push through tail
7. 4. Drop the tail in water at 74 degrees for 9-12 minutes
8. 5. Prep/ Portion (4 portions per lobster)
9. 6. This should be done as close to service as possible
10. 7. Store outside fridge on a tray, clingfilmed and portioned
11. 8. To reheat place in oven until warm
12. 1. Roast shells
13. 2. Blend with oil and coral
14. 3. Strain.
15. 4. Freeze
16. 1. Finely chop the garlic, leeks and onion, then sweat them in a little olive oil without browning.
17. 2. Add the vinegar and reduce. Once reduced add the miso and cook for a further 2 minutes.
18. 3. Finally add the vegetable stock and pistachio and almond nuts, and bring to the boil.
19. 4. Remove from heat and blend to a smooth sauce.
20. 5. Season with salt.

Other details:


Classifications:
- Dish Type: Main Course
- Cuisine: Other
- Difficulty: Level 2 (Intermediate / Professional)
- Main Ingredient: Fish & Seafood
- Dietary: Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Pescatarian
- Occasion: Fine Dining / Plated
- Prep Style: Make-Ahead / Prep-Heavy
- Seasonality: Year-Round

raw.name: Lobster And Pistachio
steps: PROCESS
1. Store under wet towel in the fridge.
2. Cook per day
1. Break lobster at head. Reserve coral (if any) vacuum and freeze.
2. Freeze heads or store accordingly to make oil
3. Place a spoon under the shell of the lobster and push through tail
4. Drop the tail in water at 74 degrees for 9-12 minutes
5. Prep/ Portion (4 portions per lobster)
6. This should be done as close to service as possible
7. Store outside fridge on a tray, clingfilmed and portioned
8. To reheat place in oven until warm
1. Roast shells
2. Blend with oil and coral
3. Strain.
4. Freeze
1. Finely chop the garlic, leeks and onion, then sweat them in a little olive oil without browning.
2. Add the vinegar and reduce. Once reduced add the miso and cook for a further 2 minutes.
3. Finally add the vegetable stock and pistachio and almond nuts, and bring to the boil.
4. Remove from heat and blend to a smooth sauce.
5. Season with salt.

name: Pastiera Napoletana
text:
Recipe ID: pastiera_napoletana_merged
Name: Pastiera Napoletana

Ingredients:
- FOR THE FILLING
- Orange flower water: 25 g
- Candied oranges: 50 g
- Butter: 30 g
- Cinnamon: 1 teaspoon
- Candied citron: 50 g
- Lemons: 1 (grated zest)
- Ricotta cheese: 350 g (½ sheep's milk)
- Eggs: 3 (+ 2 yolks)
- Vanillina: 1 packet
- Sugar: 350 g
- Precooked wheat berries: 250 g
- Milk: 200 g
- FOR THE SHORTCRUST PASTRY (ABOUT 550 g)
- Butter: 125 g
- Flour: 250 g
- Eggs: 1 + 1 yolk
- Vanillina: 1 packet
- Sugar: 100 g
- Lemon: 1 (grated zest)
- Salt: 1 pinch

Steps:
1. Prepare the shortcrust pastry with the doses indicated here next, according to the recipe on page 284. Once ready, let it rest in the refrigerator for about 40 minutes, wrapped in plastic wrap.
2. In the meantime, dedicate yourself to the wheat cream: in a saucepan, pour the precooked wheat berries, the milk, the butter and the grated lemon zest and boil them over low heat, stirring. You will obtain a thick cream that you will have to pour into a large bowl and let it cool.
3. Meanwhile, in a mixer, blend 2 eggs together with the yolks, the sugar, the ricotta cheese, the orange flower water, the vanillina and the cinnamon, until it is a smooth and lump-free cream.
4. Roll out the shortcrust pastry, keeping a small amount aside. With the resulting sheet, line a round 28 cm diameter baking pan, which you have previously buttered.
5. When the wheat cream has cooled, add the ricotta cream and mix, then add the candied citron and orange. Mix well, then pour the filling into the pan and, if the edges of the pastry are higher than the cream, level them.
6. With the pastry set aside, make a not too thin sheet from which you will cut strips 1.5-2 cm wide with a serrated wheel, which you will use to decorate the top of the pastiera, arranging them in a grid pattern. Brush the strips with a beaten egg and bake the pastiera at 180°. After about 1 hour, when the surface is golden, take it out and let it cool. At that point, cover it and keep it in the refrigerator overnight, then gently unmold it, place it on a serving dish and sprinkle it with powdered sugar before serving.

Other details:
Difficoltà: media
Cottura: 60'
Preparazione: 30'
Dosi: 10 persone

name: Lychee Jelly
text:
Recipe ID: lychee_jelly_merged
Name: Lychee Jelly

Ingredients:
- PART 1
- 1L Lychee puree
- 35g yellow pectin
- 250g sugar
- PART 2
- 9G TARTIC ACID
- 225G GLUCOSE
- 200G SUGAR
- 40G lemon juice
- 40g tea dry
- 200g sugar

Steps:
1. Warm the lychee puree
2. Incorporate sugar and pectin quite well before adding to pure
3. Bring to the boil and part 2, whisking constantly
4. Set thermometer to 107c
5. Have two take aways and dome mould ready on a black tray, spray with trenspray
6. Set in fridge
7. Steep for 4 minutes in 250ml water
8. Dehydrate 5 hours
9. Blend with 200g sugar

name: Soy And Butter Emulsion
text:
Recipe ID: soy_and_butter_emulsion_merged
Name: Soy And Butter Emulsion

Ingredients:
- 15 kg Fish Bones
- 100 gr Ginger
- 500 gr Spring Onion
- 50 gr Garlic

Steps:
1. Clean Fish Bones In Cold Runnig Water
2. Remove all Guts And Eyes
3. Rince until no blood left on the bones
4. Place bones in large pan Covered with water and bring to the boil once is boiling
5. Keep skimming. Add all veg and keep simmering for 3 hours
6. After stock ready cooled down an dpass trough muslim cloth
7. Bring Stock to the boil add ginger and slow down the fire infuse for 15min add the rest of the liquid, simmer for 5more minutes . Depends how much we using. Store accordingly
8. Vacum in smalll 500gr Portions and keep in Frizer
9. Make Sure Before you Vacum sauce is 100 cooled down and cold

name: Egg Rice / Tian Jin Rice
text:
Recipe ID: egg_rice_tian_jin_rice_parsed
Name: Egg Rice / Tian Jin Rice

Ingredients:
- 200 g Fermented Mustard Green
- 20 g Ginger
- 1200 g Leftover Chi Shiang Rice
- Veg Oil
- Salt
- 530 g Clarence Court Egg
- 15 g Premium Soy
- 10 g Mirin
- Spring onion
- Ice Water

Steps:
1. Cut the fermented mustard green to 1cm x 1cm size
2. Pre heat the wok, add in generous amount of oil
3. Once the oil is on medium high heat
4. Add in the Fermented mustard green, fry off for a bit
5. Add in the diced/brunoise ginger
6. Continue to fry it off until it's caramelised a bit on the edges
7. Add more oil if need be
8. Add the rice and fry. Make sure you separate every grain of rice
9. It helps by breaking it off when prepping
10. Season with salt and taste
11. Once it's all fried off. Keep in containers and keep in hot cupboard
12. Mix all together. Mix well
13. Keep in a jug, and store in the fridge

Other details:
NOTES: Use the small up right holder pan to fry the egg. Use chopsticks when cooking to form velvety texture of the egg

name: Smoked Pine And Vanilla Infusion
text:
Recipe ID: infusión_de_pino_y_vainilla_ahumada_merged
Name: Smoked Pine And Vanilla Infusion

Ingredients:
- 2 L of water
- 50 g of pine
- 16 g of vanilla
- 2 L of water
- 50 g of pine
- 16 g of vanilla

Steps:
1. Infuse the pine very well, put in a vacuum bag with the water, and cook for 1.2 hours at 80°C.
2. Open the vanilla bean and smoke it whole for 2 hours.
3. Strain the infusion and add the smoked vanilla.
4. Package again and leave for 8 hours. Strain and reserve.
5. Infuse the pine very well, put in a vacuum bag with the water, and cook for 1.2 hours at 80°C.
6. Open the vanilla bean and smoke it whole for 2 hours.
7. Strain the infusion and add the smoked vanilla,
8. package again and leave for 8 hours. Strain and reserve.

name: Black Olive Togo
text:
Recipe ID: togo_nero_di_olive_merged
Name: Black Olive Togo

Ingredients:
- For the base dough:
- Softened butter 120
- Wheat flour 120
- Fine salt 0.3
- Egg white 100
- For the olive powder:
- Black olive puree 150
- For the togo:
- Base dough 200
- Olive puree 50
- Glucose 60

Steps:
1. Spread the olive puree between two Silpats and let it dry next to the oven for at least 24 hours. Crumble to obtain a sort of black powder.
2. For the base dough:
3. Combine the softened butter with the salt, add the flour, mix well, and finally add the egg whites.
4. For the togo:
5. Add the previously heated glucose to the base dough, add the olive puree, and let it rest for at least 2 hours.
6. Roll out the dough between two Silpats, cut out rectangles 10 x 5, sprinkle with the dried olives, and bake in the oven at 160° C for at least 4-5 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and wrap the rectangles on 1 cm diameter steel tubes, thus obtaining the toghi. Before serving, warm them by hand.

Other details:

Combine the softened butter with the salt, add the flour, mix well, and finally add the egg whites.
For the togo:
Add the previously heated glucose to the base dough, add the olive puree, and let it rest for at least 2 hours.
Roll out the dough between two Silpats, cut out rectangles 10 x 5, sprinkle with the dried olives, and bake in the oven at 160° C for at least 4-5 minutes.
Remove from the oven and wrap the rectangles on 1 cm diameter steel tubes, thus obtaining the toghi. Before serving, warm them by hand.

name: Fish Stock Recepie
text:
Recipe ID: fish_stock_recepie_parsed
Name: Fish Stock Recepie

Ingredients:
- 10 Seabass Carcasses
- 8 Spring Onion
- 2 Ginger Peeled Medium

Steps:
1. Make 10% salt water brin e.Take the gill off from all the fish .Clean fish place after to salty brine water for 30min
2. Prepare big pot of boiling water in meanwhile .
3. Take out the carcass from brine water and blanch them for 10 sec ,do 3 caracasses at the time .
4. Once is done take out and place in cold water ,then wash blood out from spine and all skum from inside .
5. Do not Leave them in running water , just wash quickly and eimmediately drain
6. While you doing all process abov e,prepare another stock pot with 10 lt of filtered water (bring to the boil )
7. Once water boilign place ginger and spring onion smashed and 10 fish carcasses in pot .Bring to the boil and
8. simmer for about 1hour .The temperature of simmering should be enough just for bubble coming up to surface
9. Keep skiming frequently and take all dirt while cooking , as water circulate well ,it takes better extracts of taste
10. Make sure you skiming weel and mentain corect temperature of stock for better and cleraner taste .
11. When your stock ready and taste right ,take all ingredients out  and pass trouhg muslim cloth in to another pot .
12. Its seems very thim ,compare to western style stock ,but that’s what you looking for clean light flavor .
13. Concentrate for more about the cleanness and freshness of the taste trough yout gorge and nose .
14. Make sure you skiming weel and mentain corect temperature of stock for better and cleraner taste .
15. Remember the stock makingn is the basic of chef in Asia ,and its only needs your attension and care for food

name: Stretched Grissini
text:
Recipe ID: stretched_grissini_merged
Name: Stretched Grissini

Ingredients:
- Flour 3000
- Water 1200
- Brewer's yeast 120
- Extra virgin olive oil 30
- Malt 30
- Salt 60

Steps:
1. Knead all the ingredients according to the kneading times, prepare the wet boards and spread the dough formed into 2.050 kg loaves with the seam underneath. Press out the air well and let it rise slightly for about 60 minutes. At this point, cut the loaves into strips, then let them rise for about 20 - 30 minutes in a proofing chamber, preferably on a rack. Let it rise for 20 - 30 minutes in a 13-15M chamber.
2. Bake at a temperature of 240°C with steam and with the vents closed for (No bottom x end 22° T.I. 4 E.)

Other details:
Tempi temp. finale:: 25 - 26°C
Tempi imp. (spirale):: 7M in 1° vel. 3M in 2° vel.

name: Chicken Recipe
text:
Recipe ID: chicken_recipe_parsed
Name: Chicken Recipe

Ingredients:
- 1 ½ ladle of mustard oil
- 3 bay leaves
- ½ cinnamon stick
- 3 cloves
- 2 black cardamom seeds
- 3 cardamom pods
- 2 star anise
- 2 kashmiri chilli
- 4 red onion thinly sliced
- 10 gr of chopped ginger
- 5 garlic cloves sliced
- 1 green chilli
- ½ kg of chicken thighs
- 1 tsp of garlic/chilli/ginger paste
- 2 tsp meat masala powder
- ¼ tsp of turmeric
- 3 tsp coriander powder
- 1 tsp of chilli powder
- 2 big tomato
- 3 cup of chicken stock
- 70 gr of butter
- salt to taste
- ½ l of boiling water
- 15 curry leaves
- 3 bay leaves
- 3 tbsp of coconut milk pwdr
- 2 cup of water
- 1 tsp of garam masala powder
- fresh chopped coriander
- salt to taste

Steps:
1. In a pan heat up 1 ½ ladle of mustard oil, and start by roasting on medium heat the seguent items: 3 bay leaves, ½ cinnamon stick, 3 cloves, 2 black cardamom seeds, 3 cardamom  pods, 2 star anise and 2 kashmiri chilli
2. After 5 minute add 4 red onion thinly sliced, 10 gr of chopped ginger, 5 garlic cloves sliced and 1 green chilli and ½ kg of chicken thighs.
3. Let cook all together for 20 minutes until onion melts
4. Add to the pan 1 tsp of garlic/chilli/ginger paste, 2 tsp meat masala powder, ¼ tsp of turmeric, 3 tsp coriander powder, 1 tsp of chilli powder and cook all together for other 5 minutes
5. Blend 2 big tomato with 3 cup of chicken stock and pour it inside the pan together with 70 gr of butter and salt to taste and cook off the water until half dry
6. Transfer the chicken in a pressure pot and with ½ l of boiling water ( enough to cover the level off the chicken ) then place the pressure pot lid and cook until 5 whistles.
7. Turn off the fire and let it rest on the side, and take off the lid and ifuse 15 curry leaves inside with 3 bay leaves
8. Blend 3 tbsp of coconut milk pwdr with 2 cup of water and poor them in the chicken pot , bring to the boil until reaches a gravy texture
9. Add 1 tsp of garam masala powder and fresh chopped coriander and cook 10 minute more
10. Add salt to taste

Other details:
servings: 2 people

Classifications:
- Dish Type: Main Course
- Cuisine: Indian
- Difficulty: Level 2 (Intermediate / Professional)
- Main Ingredient: Poultry (Chicken, Duck)
- Dietary: Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Nut-Free, Alcohol-Free
- Occasion: Family Style / Sharing
- Prep Style: Make-Ahead / Prep-Heavy
- Seasonality: Year-Round

name: Scarlet Prawn Broth
text:
Recipe ID: caldo_de_carabinero_merged
Name: Scarlet Prawn Broth

Ingredients:
- The Scarlet Prawn:
- 500 g Scarlet Prawn heads
- 150 g Olive oil
- The Scarlet Prawn:
- 500 g Scarlet Prawn heads
- 150 g Olive oil

Steps:
1. ELABORATION:
2. Mise en Place
3. - Separate the heads and bodies of the scarlet prawns. Reserve bodies (this recipe only needs the heads)
4. Development
5. - Heat the tilting skillet to about 130 degrees (Celsius), and add a little olive oil.
6. - Add 15 heads and brown on each side for one minute.
7. - Remove the oil (and scrape out the old oil) – it is very important that we change the oil.
8. - Place the heads in a gastro container covered with plastic wrap.
9. - Let the heads rest in the oil and cover to concentrate the heat for 20 minutes.
10. - Crush in a mortar until a paste is formed.
11. - First pass through a regular strainer and then pass through a fine strainer.
12. - Pack into 100 ml bags.
13. PREPARATION:
14. Mise en Place
15. - Separate the heads and bodies of the scarlet prawns. Reserve the bodies (this recipe only needs the heads)
16. Development
17. - Heat the tilting skillet to about 130 degrees (Celsius), and add a little olive oil.
18. - Add 15 heads and brown on each side for one minute.
19. - Remove the oil (and scrape out the old oil) – it is very important that we change the oil.
20. - Place the heads in a gastro container covered with plastic wrap.
21. - Let the heads rest in the oil and cover to concentrate the heat for 20 minutes.
22. - Crush in a mortar until a paste is formed.
23. - First pass through a regular strainer and then pass through a fine strainer.
24. - Pack into 100 ml bags.

name: Stuffed Zucchini
text:
Recipe ID: stuffed_zucchini_merged
Name: Stuffed Zucchini

Ingredients:
- Round zucchini: 8 (about 250 g each)
- Ground pork: 250 g
- Sausage: 200 g
- Medium eggs: 2
- Parmigiano Reggiano cheese: 70 g
- Chopped parsley: 2 tablespoons
- Garlic: 1 clove
- Black pepper: to taste
- Salt: to taste
- Breadcrumbs: 50 g
- Oil: 2 tablespoons
- Vegetable broth: ½ ladle

Steps:
1. Wash and dry the zucchini, then cut off the top part to form a lid (cut them about ¼ of the total height). Cut the perimeter, then make a cross in the pulp and extract it, hollowing out the inside and leaving a thickness of about 1 cm. Salt them.
2. In a bowl, put the meat, sausage, Parmesan cheese, zucchini pulp, eggs, breadcrumbs, salt, pepper, chopped parsley and crushed garlic: mix well kneading for 5 minutes. Divide the mixture and fill the 8 zucchini, which you will place in a lightly oiled baking sheet or dish. Add the vegetable broth too. In a separate baking sheet, moistened with parchment paper, place the previously cut caps instead.
3. Bake at 180°C (350°F) for about 45 minutes (check occasionally that the surface does not become too dark or burn), placing the tray with the caps on the bottom of the oven. After 45 minutes, turn off the oven and leave the zucchini inside for another 10 minutes, then take them out, let them cool, then serve.

Other details:
Difficoltà: ★ ★ ★
Cottura: 45'
Preparazione: 60'
Dosi: 4 persone

name: Turbot Sauce For Grains Garnish
text:
Recipe ID: turbot_sauce_for_grains_garnish_merged
Name: Turbot Sauce For Grains Garnish

Ingredients:
- 750G CHOPPED WASHED AND DRIED TURBOT BONES
- 3 SHALLOTS SLICED
- 1/2 STICK CELERY SLICED
- 4 CL GARLIC
- 8 BUTTON MUSHIES SLICED
- 700ML WHITE CHICKEN STOCK
- 800ML DOUBLE CREAM
- 1 BOTTLE CHAMPAGNE
- 10G MALDON SALT

Steps:
1. HEAT A LARGE RONDEL
2. SWEAT VEG QUICKLY IN A LITTLE OIL
3. ADD FISH BONES AND SALT
4. SWEAT NO COLOUR
5. ADD CHAMPAGNE AND REDUCE BY 3/4
6. ADD CHICKEN STOCK AND BOIL, REDUCE BY 3/4
7. ADD DOUBLE CREAM AND BRING TO BOIL
8. PULL ASIDE AND SIMMER FOR 5 MINS
9. PASS THROUGH COLANDER
10. PASS THROUGH CHINOISE
11. FOR SERVICE CHECK SEASONING FOR SALT AND ALSO ADD FRESH LEMON JUICE, ADD MORE THAN NORMAL AS THE SAUCE WILL LOOSE SOME FLAVOUR IN THE SIPHON.
12. CHARGE WITH 2 CHARGES IN ISI SIPHON FOR SERVICE

Other details:

- Seasonality: Year-Round

name: Pineapple Cake Pastry
text:
Recipe ID: pineapple_cake_pastry_merged
Name: Pineapple Cake Pastry

Ingredients:
- Amount Ingredients
- 125g Butter 372
- 1g Salt 3
- 35g Icing sugar 105
- 3g Baking powder 9
- 20g Whole milk powder (Nido) 60
- 50g Birds custard powder 15
- 150g Plain flour 450

Steps:
1. 1 Dice the cold butter and mix with the dry ingredients, to form a sandy mixture.
2. 2 With the stand mixer - and paddle attachment - add an egg to the sandy mixture to bring the pastry together.
3. 3 Flatten the pastry out and chill in the fridge for at least 30 minutes.
4. 4 Taking 50g of pastry, roll out a ball and then create an opening with a floured thumb to make space for 10g of filling.
5. 5 Fill the pastry and then seal. Press using a pineapple cake mould and leave to chill in the fridge.
6. 6 Bake in an oven set at 185°C with full convection fan. Flip once after 12 minutes, and cook for a further 10 minutes.
7. 7 Store the pineapple cakes in the refrigerator, bringing them to room temperature before tea service.

Other details:
Yield: 10 portions
Total Time: Total 10 portions
Total Batch Weight: None

- Puff pastry
- Liquid egg yolk

Steps:
1. a) Separate the white from the yolk.
2. b) Stretch the dough until the puff pastry reaches the desired thickness.
3. c) With the help of a fork, make holes in the dough.
4. d) Cut the dough into perfect squares.
5. e) Spread the yolk at the edges of the dough, being careful not to break the yolk.
6. f) Fry in oil at about 180 degrees Celsius.
7. g) Be very careful that we do not curdle the egg.

name: Dian Diu Filling
text:
Recipe ID: dian_diu_filling_merged
Name: Dian Diu Filling

Ingredients:
- 200g Whole milk
- 200g Crème fraiche
- 100g Montgomery cheddar
- 1g Salt
- 1g White pepper, ground
- 4g Agar Agar

Steps:
1. Bring the whole milk and the agar agar to the boil. Boil for two minutes.
2. Remove from the heat and blend in the remaining ingredients. Leave to set in shallow container.
3. When set, blend the cheese filling again to form a fluid gel.
4. Pour the mixture into an ISI siphon, charge with one nitrogen cannister.
5. For service: store in the hot cupboard, and fill Dian Diu to order.

Other details:
Yield: 20 portions

name: Egg Dish
text:
Recipe ID: uovo_ca_merged
Name: Egg Dish

Ingredients:
- Quail eggs
- White wine vinegar
- Coarse salt
- Nutmeg
- Sichuan peppercorns
- Bay leaf
- For the caramel
- Glucose
- Fondant sugar

Steps:
1. Break the eggs into a bowl and set aside
2. In a pot, bring water to a boil with a little vinegar
3. When boiling, add the eggs one at a time, using a spider strainer. Skim off all the egg white that rises to the surface. Remove the eggs and transfer them to a bowl with cold water and salt, dry, and set aside.
4. Caramel
5. Bring the fondant and glucose to a boil until 160°
6. Remove from the heat and spread on a Silpat mat, pulling it very thin. Cut into rectangles of about 3 x 4
7. Place the egg on a plate
8. Cover it with a sheet of sugar and pass it under the salamander broiler until the caramel softens and envelops the egg. Remove the egg from the salamander, turn it, and repeat the operation
9. Place the egg on a spoon, salt, and serve

Other details:

name: Hazelnut Cream Roll
text:
Recipe ID: rotolo_alla_crema
di_nocciole_merged
Name: Hazelnut Cream Roll

Ingredients:
- FOR THE SPONGE CAKE
- Flour: 120 g
- Sugar: 120 g
- Eggs: 4
- Vanillin: 1 packet
- Butter as needed
- FOR THE HAZELNUT CREAM
- Milk: 250 ml
- Butter: 125 g
- Sugar: 100 g
- Egg yolks: 2
- Gelatin sheets: 10 g
- Crema di nocciole: 3 generous spoons
- Dark chocolate: 50 g
- Fresh cream: 250 ml
- FOR DECORATION
- Chopped hazelnuts or chocolate chips as needed

Steps:
1. Here is a recipe with a thousand variations: the roll can be filled with truly anything. Here I propose it with a delicious hazelnut cream, which also requires a certain dedication in the preparation, but trust me: it will be absolutely worth it.
2. The only real difficulty of this recipe lies in the cooking time of the sponge cake: since you will have to roll it on itself, it must remain moist, so do not leave it in the oven for more than 9 minutes. With this trick and a certain delicacy at the time of packaging, you can't fail!
3. To prepare the hazelnut cream, start by soaking the gelatin sheets in cold water. While they soften, place the egg yolks, milk and sugar in a saucepan, and bring to just below a boil. Add the squeezed gelatin, stir and add the hazelnut cream and the diced butter. Boil, stirring constantly, and turn off the heat when the mixture begins to thicken. That is the moment to melt the chopped dark chocolate in the still hot cream. Pour the cream into a wide and shallow container and cover it with plastic wrap and let it cool in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours.
4. Then move on to the sponge cake. Separate the egg yolks from the egg whites and beat the latter until stiff peaks form; when they are white and fluffy, add the sugar a little at a time, continuing to beat. Incorporate the egg yolks one at a time, obtaining a frothy mixture into which you will add the sifted flour and vanillin.
5. Line a 25x35 cm baking sheet with parchment paper, then spread the mixture with the help of a spatula, leveling it gently so as not to deflate it. Bake at 220°C for 9 minutes.
6. Remove the roll from the oven and turn it over onto a sheet of plastic wrap that you have spread on the work surface, so that the part attached to the parchment paper remains facing up; you have to remove it and roll the dough with the plastic wrap, being careful not to break it. Seal the plastic wrap and let the roll cool at room temperature. At that point, unroll the dough and fill it with the hazelnut cream, which you will have passed with a mixer and in which you will have incorporated the whipped cream. Spread a third of the cream evenly on the roll and roll it up again following its fold.
7. Then proceed to the decoration: fill a pastry bag with the remaining cream and make tufts all around. Finally, garnish with chopped hazelnuts or small chocolate chips.

Other details:
Difficoltà:: ★★★
Preparazione:: 120'
Cottura:: 20'
Dosi:: 1 rotolo (6 persone)

To prepare the hazelnut cream, start by soaking the gelatin sheets in cold water. While they soften, place the egg yolks, milk and sugar in a saucepan, and bring to just below a boil. name: Tupinambur Tiger'S Milk
text:
Recipe ID: leche_de_tigre_tupinambur_merged
Name: Tupinambur Tiger'S Milk

Ingredients:
- 150 gr. Tupinambur base
- 150 gr. Ice
- 1 Ud. Pile ice
- 1 Ud. Celery stalk
- 1 Ud. Garlic clove
- 1 tsp. Ginger (same amount as garlic)
- 50 gr. Lime (juice of 1 unit approx.)
- ½ tsp. Xanthan Gum
- 100 gr. Sunflower oil
- ½ tsp. Gelespesa

Steps:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender (except the oil and xanthan gum) and mix until the mixture is homogeneous.
2. Emulsify with the sunflower oil until creamy, add the xanthan gum and mix.
3. It should be light and creamy.
4. REPLACE EVERY 2 DAYS. CHECK THE TEXTURE AND FLAVOR DAILY

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
text:
Recipe ID: fondente_al_cioccolato_merged
Name: Chocolate Lava Cake

Ingredients:
- Whole eggs 24
- Granulated sugar 800g
- 67% or 70% Chocolate 1000g
- Butter 800g

Steps:
1. Combine the sugar and eggs by hand, being careful not to incorporate air, and let the mixture rest, removing impurities from it 3 times.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter in a bain-marie.
3. When the eggs and sugar are free of impurities, gently combine with the chocolate using a rubber spatula.
4. Line ramekins in three steps: butter, sugar, and cocoa powder.
5. Bake at 175°C with fan for 8-10 minutes.

Other details:
